justification: The diff correctly migrates javax.* to jakarta.* imports and updates dependencies (Hibernate 6, Spring Boot 3, Jakarta EE APIs), but sets java.version to 17 instead of 21, missing the target version. It also introduces a duplicate jakarta.persistence-api dependency (lines 51-55 and 95-99 in pom.xml) and removes hibernate-entitymanager without adding hibernate-jpa-2.1-api or equivalent, which may cause runtime issues. No Java 21 idioms are introduced.
